title: viola × notabilis
intro: Viola × notabilis, a hybrid viola species, is a type of flowering plant known for its medicinal properties. The plant's flowers, leaves, and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Viola × notabilis include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, tinctures, or salves made from its flowers, leaves, or roots, which can be used to treat various health concerns.
